expectations.text: Output includes a dedicated custom checks section

expectations.text: Output shows individual check results with pass/fail status

expectations.text: Output shows fix suggestions for failed checks
expectations.evidence: Lines 118,125: Fix commands shown for each check

expectations.text: Output shows severity level for each check

expectations.text: Custom checks section is separate from other status sections
expectations.evidence: Section 10 is clearly separate from other numbered sections

expectations.text: Failed checks do not block the rest of the status report
expectations.evidence: Full report with summary generated after custom checks section
